docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE AS TO DEFENDANT MUELA, CARLOS DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTAURANT GOMEZ, FABRA MATILDE DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTRNT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF, ENRIQUE CHUMPITAZ, REQUESTED FOR A SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR HIS TRIAL DATE. REQUEST SUBMITTED TO COURT INTERPRETER SUPERVISOR-HOJ.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUELA, CARLOS DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTAURANT
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ, FABRA MATILDE DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTRNT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHUMPITAZ, ENRIQUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUELA, CARLOS DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTAURANT GOMEZ, FABRA MATILDE DBA ESPERPENTO TAPAS RESTRNT ALTHOUGH THE COURT DETERMINED THAT PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYMENT ENTITLED HIM TO RECEIVE A PORTION OF TIPS, PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT HE HAD ZERO RECEIVED LESS THAN THE AMOUNT TO WHICH HE WAS ENTITLED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
